case_title: CELENA GARCIA et al VS. ERIKA WILLIAMS et al

docket_entries.description: ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUL-14-2003. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-25-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. MAY-16-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
